title: Scene-tree traversal cost
symptoms: scenetree.propagate walks a deep or wide node tree each frame
scene tree traversal / propagate dominates the frame
per-node update cost grows with node count
hitch as the scene tree gets large
mechanism: A per-frame traversal of the scene tree (propagation of notifications, transforms or updates) visits a very large or deep node graph, so the traversal itself becomes the bottleneck.
diagnosis_hints: Check node count and tree depth; see whether disabling processing on idle subtrees removes the spike.
typical_fixes: disable processing on inactive nodes / subtrees
flatten or prune the scene tree, cache transforms
move per-node work to a data-oriented batch where possible
